items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement regarding the 'Optional minimum amount for flexible pricing'. However, the prior step evidence does not provide any concrete data or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The evidence primarily focuses on successful bookings and offers but lacks any reference to the minimum amount functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
